series_metadata.series_description: A repository of all site specific information relevant to the investigation and remediation of known or suspected hazardous substance site.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retained in operating area until the remedial action phase of the project is completed (5-10 years), then reviewed by Legal and State Archivist for possible transfer to state Archives. If State Archives doesn't want it, then destroy by shredding., Paper: Archives
